title: GitHub Integration

acceptance_criteria_testability.rationale: All ACs testable. GitHub API calls verifiable via curl. Link clicks testable in browser. Auto-refresh verifiable in DevTools. Error handling testable by disconnecting API.

no_invented_features.rationale: Every requirement traces to explicit AC. GitHub API endpoints are standard (commits, PRs, branches). No invented features beyond dashboard integration.

pattern_consistency.rationale: Follows Hook → useQuery → Component pattern from 3.10, 3.11. Includes backend endpoint (new for Wave 5 but consistent across 3.11-3.13). Pattern is consistent.

brownfield_context_respected.rationale: Updates existing GitHubView component. Uses existing GITHUB_TOKEN from .env. No new infrastructure — just GitHub API integration. Respects existing patterns.

real_data_emphasis.rationale: Explicitly fetches real GitHub data (commits, PRs, branches). No mock data. Testing emphasizes real GitHub repository (SynkraAI/aiox-core).

backend_frontend_scope_clarity.rationale: Backend scope: 3 endpoints for GitHub API integration. Frontend scope: service + hook + component update. Clear separation. No ambiguity.

reasoning: Story 3.12 is well-scoped STANDARD story (12/25 pts). External API integration is straightforward with GitHub CLI. Specification is clear with detailed testing strategy. Can run in parallel with 3.11 (no dependencies). No revisions needed. Ready for development after 3.10.
critical_notes: Can run in parallel with 3.11 (independent story)
GITHUB_TOKEN must be configured before development
GitHub CLI must be authenticated (usually already true)
External API dependency — may be rate-limited in testing
dev_notes: Test GitHub CLI: gh api repos/SynkraAI/aiox-core/commits
Implement service methods using GitHub CLI via execSync
Test each endpoint with curl before connecting frontend
Handle GitHub API rate limiting (implement caching with staleTime)
Test error cases: invalid token, no internet, etc.
Verify links open correct GitHub URLs in new tab
potential_blockers: GITHUB_TOKEN missing in .env — must add before development
GitHub API rate limiting — careful during testing
GitHub CLI may not be installed — fallback to Octokit
